CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arraySum(values) AS sum FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayJoin(values) AS value FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_arrays_nested AS SELECT id, array([array(1, 2), array(3, 4)]) AS nested_array FROM test_arrays;
INSERT INTO test_arrays_nested SELECT id, arrayExpand(nested_array) FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayMap(x -> x * 2, values) AS doubled_values FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayReduce('sum', values) AS total_sum FROM test_arrays GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, arrayFilter(x -> x > 2, values) AS filtered_values FROM test_arrays;
WITH (SELECT arrayAgg(x) FROM test_arrays) AS aggregated_array SELECT arrayJoin(aggregated_array) AS value;
SELECT id, arrayConcat(values, [99, 100]) AS extended_values FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 2;
CREATE TABLE users (user_id UInt32, user_friends Array(UInt32));
SELECT u.user_id, arrayJoin(u.user_friends) AS friend_id FROM users AS u JOIN test_arrays AS t ON u.user_id = t.id;
